productDisplayName: Forever New Women's Top Black Dress
description: CompositionBlack tube dress with black lining that has outer made of 82% acetate, 16% viscose and 2% elastane and lining made of 97% polyester and 3% elastane, with concealed zipper closure on the left side, underwired seams, pleated panel on the front and double layer from the waist  FittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Bring out the vixen in you with this sleek black tube dress from  forever new. The contoured lines on this dress with the pleated panel on the front imbibes it with sexy confidence. Team this with metallic heels and a bold golden ring and you are all set to rock the party.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
